syntax_13716.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_13716.title: Bind Preset
syntax_13716.description:
Binds a preset's abilities to a player.
Can bind either player-specific presets or external presets.
The abilities will be bound to the player's hotbar in the order they were added to the preset.
syntax_13716.syntax_pattern:
bind [player] preset %string% to %player%
bind external preset %string% to %player%

en:
Binds a preset's abilities to a player.
Can bind either player-specific presets or external presets.
The abilities will be bound to the player's hotbar in the order they were added to the preset.

syntax_13717.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_13717.title: Bind ProjectKorra Ability
syntax_13717.description: Assigns a ProjectKorra bending ability to a specific hotbar slot (1-9) for a player. If no slot is specified, it uses the player's currently selected hotbar slot.

en: Assigns a ProjectKorra bending ability to a specific hotbar slot (1-9) for a player. If no slot is specified, it uses the player's currently selected hotbar slot.

syntax_13718.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_13718.title: Clear ProjectKorra Ability Binding
syntax_13718.description: Removes any bending ability bound to a specified hotbar slot. If no slot number is given, clears the ability from the player's currently selected slot. Use this to remove unwanted abilities from a player's hotbar.

en: Removes any bending ability bound to a specified hotbar slot. If no slot number is given, clears the ability from the player's currently selected slot. Use this to remove unwanted abilities from a player's hotbar.

syntax_13719.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_13719.title: Create Preset
syntax_13719.description:
Creates a new preset with optional abilities.
Can create either a player-specific preset or an external preset.
If a preset with the same name exists, it will be overwritten.
External presets are available to all players.
syntax_13719.syntax_pattern:
create [new] preset %string% for %player% [with abilities %strings%]
create [new] external preset %string% [with abilities %strings%]

en:
Creates a new preset with optional abilities.
Can create either a player-specific preset or an external preset.
If a preset with the same name exists, it will be overwritten.
External presets are available to all players.

syntax_13720.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_13720.title: Delete Preset
syntax_13720.description:
Deletes a preset from a player or removes an external preset.
Player presets are only deleted for that specific player.
External presets are completely removed from the server.
syntax_13720.syntax_pattern:
delete [player['s]] preset %string% from %player%
delete %player%'s preset %string%
delete external preset %string%

en:
Deletes a preset from a player or removes an external preset.
Player presets are only deleted for that specific player.
External presets are completely removed from the server.

syntax_13721.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_13721.title: Toggle Player's Bending
syntax_13721.description: Enables or disables all bending abilities for a player. When disabled, the player cannot use any bending abilities until re-enabled. Can toggle between states or set to a specific state.

en: Enables or disables all bending abilities for a player. When disabled, the player cannot use any bending abilities until re-enabled. Can toggle between states or set to a specific state.

syntax_13722.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_13722.title: Bending Status
syntax_13722.description:
Checks if a player's bending is enabled or disabled.
Returns true if bending is enabled, false if disabled.

en:
Checks if a player's bending is enabled or disabled.
Returns true if bending is enabled, false if disabled.

syntax_13723.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_13723.title: Bound Ability
syntax_13723.description:
Returns the player's currently bound ability or the ability bound to a specific slot.
If no slot is specified, returns the ability from the current active slot.
Returns nothing if the slot is empty or invalid.

en:
Returns the player's currently bound ability or the ability bound to a specific slot.
If no slot is specified, returns the ability from the current active slot.
Returns nothing if the slot is empty or invalid.

syntax_13724.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_13724.title: Get All Bending Presets
syntax_13724.description: Returns a list of all preset names. Can return player-specific presets, external (global) presets, or both.

en: Returns a list of all preset names. Can return player-specific presets, external (global) presets, or both.

syntax_13725.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_13725.title: Get All Bound Bending Abilities
syntax_13725.description: Returns a list of all abilities currently bound to a player's slots (1-9). Empty slots will return an empty string. The returned list is always 9 elements long, representing each slot.

en: Returns a list of all abilities currently bound to a player's slots (1-9). Empty slots will return an empty string. The returned list is always 9 elements long, representing each slot.

syntax_13726.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_13726.title: Get Bending Element of Ability
syntax_13726.description: Returns the element type (Water, Earth, Fire, Air, Chi, or sub-elements) of a specified ProjectKorra ability. Returns nothing if the ability doesn't exist.

en: Returns the element type (Water, Earth, Fire, Air, Chi, or sub-elements) of a specified ProjectKorra ability. Returns nothing if the ability doesn't exist.

syntax_13727.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_13727.title: Preset Abilities
syntax_13727.description:
Gets all abilities from a player's preset or an external preset.
Returns a list of ability names stored in the preset.

en:
Gets all abilities from a player's preset or an external preset.
Returns a list of ability names stored in the preset.

syntax_13715.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_13715.title: Check Bending Preset Existence
syntax_13715.description: Checks if a bending preset configuration exists. Can verify both player-specific presets and server-wide (external) presets.

en: Checks if a bending preset configuration exists. Can verify both player-specific presets and server-wide (external) presets.

syntax_14240.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_14240.title: Is Temp Block
syntax_14240.description: Checks whether a location is occupied by a ProjectKorra TempBlock.
syntax_14240.syntax_pattern:
%location% is [a] temp[orary] block
%location% is(n't| not) [a] temp[orary] block

en: Checks whether a location is occupied by a ProjectKorra TempBlock.

syntax_14241.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_14241.title: Create Temp Block
syntax_14241.description: Creates a ProjectKorra TempBlock at the specified location, optionally reverting after a duration.
syntax_14241.syntax_pattern:
create [a] temp[orary] block at %location% with %itemtype% [for %timespan%]
create [a] temp[orary] block at %location% with blockdata %blockdata% [for %timespan%]

en: Creates a ProjectKorra TempBlock at the specified location, optionally reverting after a duration.

syntax_14242.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_14242.title: Revert Temp Block
syntax_14242.description: Reverts a ProjectKorra TempBlock at a location, optionally specifying the default material.

en: Reverts a ProjectKorra TempBlock at a location, optionally specifying the default material.

syntax_14246.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_14246.title: Remaining Cooldown Timespan
syntax_14246.description: Returns the remaining duration of a ProjectKorra cooldown for a player as a timespan. Returns zero when the cooldown is not active.

en: Returns the remaining duration of a ProjectKorra cooldown for a player as a timespan. Returns zero when the cooldown is not active.

syntax_14244.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_14244.title: Start Ability
syntax_14244.description: Launches a registered ProjectKorra ability defined through this addon for a specific player.

en: Launches a registered ProjectKorra ability defined through this addon for a specific player.

syntax_14247.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_14247.title: Active Cooldown Names
syntax_14247.description: Lists active ProjectKorra cooldowns for a player in the same order as /bending cooldown view.

en: Lists active ProjectKorra cooldowns for a player in the same order as /bending cooldown view.

syntax_14243.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_14243.title: Set Ability Location
syntax_14243.description: Sets the anchor location for a running ability instance generated through this addon, allowing you to track it independently from the player.

en: Sets the anchor location for a running ability instance generated through this addon, allowing you to track it independently from the player.

syntax_14251.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_14251.title: Ability
syntax_14251.description: Defines a ProjectKorra ability implemented in Skript.
syntax_14251.entries: [{"name": "element", "isRequired": true, "isSection": false}, {"name": "description", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false, "defaultValue": ""}, {"name": "instructions", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false, "defaultValue": ""}, {"name": "author", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false, "defaultValue": "Unknown"}, {"name": "version", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false, "defaultValue": "1.0.0"}, {"name": "cooldown", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false}, {"name": "sneak ability", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false, "defaultValue": "false"}, {"name": "hidden", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false, "defaultValue": "false"}, {"name": "harmless", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false, "defaultValue": "false"}, {"name": "ignite ability", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false, "defaultValue": "false"}, {"name": "explosive ability", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false, "defaultValue": "false"}, {"name": "default permission", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false, "defaultValue": "true"}, {"name": "start", "isRequired": true, "isSection": true}, {"name": "progress", "isRequired": false, "isSection": true}, {"name": "remove", "isRequired": false, "isSection": true}]

en: Defines a ProjectKorra ability implemented in Skript.

syntax_14252.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_14252.title: Reset Cooldown
syntax_14252.description: Clears a ProjectKorra cooldown for a player, or removes every active cooldown when using the "all" variant.

en: Clears a ProjectKorra cooldown for a player, or removes every active cooldown when using the "all" variant.

syntax_14253.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_14253.title: Set Cooldown
syntax_14253.description: Sets a ProjectKorra cooldown for a player. Using a non-positive duration removes the cooldown instead.

en: Sets a ProjectKorra cooldown for a player. Using a non-positive duration removes the cooldown instead.

syntax_14248.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_14248.title: Bendable Blocks
syntax_14248.description: Returns recent bendable block sources for a player's element using ProjectKorra's BlockSource logic.

en: Returns recent bendable block sources for a player's element using ProjectKorra's BlockSource logic.

syntax_14245.creator: anxhelokojku
syntax_14245.title: Stop Ability
syntax_14245.description: Ends a running ProjectKorra ability generated through this addon. When used without an argument inside start/progress/remove sections, it stops the active ability instance.

en: Ends a running ProjectKorra ability generated through this addon. When used without an argument inside start/progress/remove sections, it stops the active ability instance.
